findings.evidence: `rg -n "\bchange\b" TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/ComplexModule.lean` reports line 76; Mathlib exposes `Complex.liftAux_apply` at `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Complex/Module.lean:313`, so this coercion step can be made explicit.
findings.fix: Replace this with an explicit helper lemma/congruence from `Complex.liftAux_apply` (or add a comment documenting why the `change` is unavoidable) so the public defining lemma does not depend silently on defeq.
findings.issue: `complexModule_smul_def` uses an uncommented `change` to coerce the `Complex.liftAux ... .toRingHom` action into the underlying endomorphism application, hiding reliance on the internal definitional shape of the wrappers.

summary: One defining proof still uses undocumented definitional equality to expose wrapper internals, so the proof is brittle under Mathlib refactors.
